title: Aciotis alata

This family is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The genus Aciotis itself is a part of the tribe Merianieae within the family Melastomataceae. The classification of Aciotis alata is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its distinctive leaves and flowers. Aciotis alata's classification is also based on its morphological and molecular features.
